version: Exam questions align to the Summer '22 release

testing_centers.notes: In-person and online proctored via Kryterion Webassessor

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name must match Webassessor registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. No access to Salesforce org. Proctor monitors via webcam.
renewal_options: Salesforce releases three major updates per year. For each release, certified professionals must complete a free maintenance module on Trailhead to retain their certification. No cost for maintenance.
target_audience: Individuals who have knowledge, skills, and experience architecting and driving multi-cloud B2B solutions that deliver business value for the customer.
recommended_experience: 4–5 years of experience as a Solution Architect with experience with the mentioned Salesforce products.

retake_policy.notes: Retake available after scheduling (no mandatory waiting period for first retake). Retake fee ~$100 for most exams.

objectives.title: Document and articulate the business needs, value, and vision of the customer to support their desired business outcomes.
Define the future blueprint architecture of a B2B multi-cloud Salesforce solution in order to define the product roadmap.
Define the incremental steps necessary to reach the recommended future end state that supports business outcomes.
Define the data flows across systems, the methods and techniques to connect systems, and the relationship each system has to the data it contains.
Define the strategy to migrate data, and synchronize data across systems to support a multi-cloud B2B solution.
Design and map a sharing and visibility model for a B2B multi-cloud Salesforce solution.
Provide governance to satisfy business requirements.
Define the functional and technical solution, in line with Salesforce standards, keeping the business value and objectives in mind.
Recommend an appropriate Salesforce multi-cloud or AppExchange solution.
Identify design options and their associated risks, assess their level of criticality, and recommend the solution that most accurately meets the specified functional and nonfunctional requirements.
Facilitate final acceptance from stakeholders by ensuring any concerns raised are adequately addressed.
Choose the preferred method for integrating data across different clouds.
Define appropriate strategies that balance resources and effort to deliver an effective and efficient delivery method.
Ensure that there is a clear understanding of business requirements through to the delivered configuration.
Provide the appropriate display of the capabilities of that solution to stakeholders (demos) that demonstrate continued alignment with the desired business outcomes and priorities.
Ensure that stakeholders are appropriately enabled to manage the solution moving forward.
Determine how to further improve the solution to ensure business benefits are continuously realized.
Determine how to facilitate adoption in order for the business to benefit from a B2B multi-cloud solution.

official_study_resources.title: Salesforce Trailhead
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning platform with trails aligned to each certification

official_study_resources.title: Salesforce Exam Guide & Sample Questions
